nasb.text: “Again, you have heard that the ancients were told, ‘You shall not make false vows, but shall fulfill your vows to the Lord.’

esv.text: “Again     you have heard that it was said to those of old,     ‘You shall not swear falsely, but     shall perform to the Lord what you have sworn.’

cnv.text: “你們又聽過有這樣吩咐古人的話：‘不可背約，向主許的願都要償還。’

ccb.text: “你们也听过吩咐古人的话，‘不可违背誓言，总要向主遵守所起的誓。’

csbs.text: “另外，你们听过那吩咐古人的话：‘不可起假誓。你所起的誓，总要向主偿还。’
